text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
During a shopping trip around the station, I
happen to catch a glimpse of someone in a
familiar uniform.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
For some reason, she ducks into a quiet alleyway.
I follow after her, and...

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Hey! The hell do ya think you're doin', followin'
me around?

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Depending on your answer, I got some ideas on
what to do with ya.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I tell her that I wasn't following her, and that I was
just worried because she was heading somewhere
isolated.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Is that right? You're not even my trainer, so I
guess that makes you a busybody.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, don't worry. I'm just out for a meal. A
few of my go-to restaurants are down this alley.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
They're just little holes in the wall, but the food's
good. Not to mention cheap.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: I can't decide if I want tripe stew or curry today...

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: Oh. Like tripe, do ya? Don't see that every day.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
It's an acquired taste, so a lotta people don't like
it. Anyway, why'd ya choose tripe?
choice_data_list: The rich flavor is perfect for a cold day.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Ah, I see you're a fellow connoisseur of healthy
dining.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
The modern food they serve in the cafeteria isn't
horrible, per se...

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
But sometimes you just wanna enjoy some good
old-fashioned stewed offal goodness enhanced
by the natural sweetness of vegetables.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
That reminds me. There's a racecourse with a shop
that sells a killer tripe stew.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Maybe I'll head there next time... At any rate, you
better hurry on home now.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Katsu curry? Lookin' for a boost of good luck or
somethin'?

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
That's a load of superstitious nonsense. But I
guess it's in our nature to want to rely on a
greater power.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: I suppose it wouldn't hurt to play along today.
choice_data_list:
They serve katsu curry at the academy, you
know.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: Sorry, but I feel like eating alone today.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
If I eat at school, overly friendly folks like
yourself will just keep droppin' by to stick their
nose in my business.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Whereas here in the alley, I don't need to say a
word beyond what I want to eat.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Though, I guess the way they give me extra-large
portions without asking sometimes is just their
quiet way of meddling.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
That reminds me. There's a racecourse with a
curry restaurant famous for its extra-large
portions.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Maybe I'll head there next time... At any rate, you
better hurry on home now.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Having said that, Nakayama Festa turns on her
heel and disappears into the alley.
